# Spatial Filtering

**Summary**: A processing technique to remove large-scale regional gravity effects to highlight local geological variations.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-hanif|Hanif, 2018]] applied spatial filtering to separate residual anomalies from the total gravity field.
